title: Oven Pork Chops
method: Toss potatoes in oil/salt/pepper on a tray and bake for 15 mins.
Mix ketchup, soy, sugar, oil, garlic, vinegar, and Worcestershire sauce for the rub.
Slather pork chops with the rub.
Add pork to the tray with potatoes and bake for 15 mins.
Flip pork, brush with remaining sauce, and broil/grill for 5-10 mins until caramelised.
notes: Ensure potatoes are no larger than 3cm to cook in time.
Use bone-in chops for the best flavor and juiciness.
